text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MBSF Other Chronic or Potentially Disabling Conditions Segment Codebook │ August 2025 │ V 1.7 46 

MULSCL_MEDICARE 

LABEL: Multiple Sclerosis and Transverse Myelitis End-of-Year Indicator — Medicare Only Claims 

DESCRIPTION: This variable indicates whether a beneficiary met the condition criteria for multiple sclerosis and 
transverse myelitis as of the end of the calendar year. 

SHORT NAME: MULSCL_MEDICARE 

LONG NAME:
